review_text: Absolutely love this dress, the fabric is soft and it fits true to size. Got compliments all night.
Runs at least two sizes small and the zipper broke the first time I wore it. Sending it back.
Nice color but the material feels cheap for the price. Not sure I would buy again.
Comfortable fit, decent quality, arrived a day late but overall fine.
The fabric pilled after one wash and the seams started coming apart. Disappointed in the quality.
Perfect length and the fit is flattering. Delivery was fast too. Highly recommend.
It's okay. Fits as expected, nothing special, color is a bit duller than the photo.
Way too tight in the shoulders even though I ordered my usual size. Returning for a refund.
Gorgeous fabric and excellent stitching. Worth every penny, will definitely order more.
Customer service was rude when I asked about my delayed order. The skirt itself is fine.
Sizing chart was accurate for once. Soft cotton, good price, happy customer.
The color faded after the second wash. For this price I expected better quality.
Lovely blouse but it arrived wrinkled and the delivery took over two weeks.
Fits like a glove and the fabric drapes beautifully. One of my best purchases this year.
Too short and boxy on me. The material is thin and see-through. Not recommended.
Great value for the price, comfortable and well made. Shipping was quick.
The fit is strange, very tight at the waist and loose at the hips. Quality is decent though.
Beautiful sweater, warm and soft, true to size. Delivery exactly on time.
Ordered a medium and it could fit two of me. Sizing is wildly inconsistent here.
Color is exactly as pictured and the fabric is high quality. Slightly pricey but worth it.
